name: @johnludlow/agents
description: Reusable AI agents and skills for feature planning, implementation, documentation, and testing across C#, TypeScript, and C++ projects

scripts.install:local: echo "Use 'apm install <path>' to install this package locally (requires apm)."
scripts.postinstall: echo "This package no longer runs an automated postinstall. Use 'apm install' to deploy primitives."
scripts.uninstall: echo "Use the runtime's package uninstall mechanism or remove generated harness files manually."
scripts.restore: echo "Restore is not supported — remove or recreate installed artifacts manually."

author: John Ludlow
